page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package can be used to plot genome-wide data (e.g. expression, CGH, SNP) along each strand of a given chromosome as a heat map, that can be used to interactively identify probes and genes of interest.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package can be used to plot genome-wide data (e.g. expression, CGH, SNP) along each strand of a given chromosome as a heat map, that can be used to interactively identify probes and genes of interest.
